name: Relationship Coach/Help
description:
This bot won’t speak in a roleplay type way. The name is self explanatory. I couldn’t find any actually good bots regarding this topic so I thought I’d make one.

Hopefully it can help you sort anything out, figure out what to say or do, plan gifts, articulate any conflicts you wish to bring up into words, and just give advice on your relationship.
creator: mattvirgin
